title: Bridge Essay: Deep Active Inference and Scene Construction.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent Arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Predictive processing — free energy principle, Bayesian brain, active inference, neural causality.

**Deep Active Inference and Scene Construction.**. Front Artif Intell.. PMID: 33733195. DOI: 10.3389/frai.2020.509354. Adaptive agents must act in intrinsically uncertain environments with complex latent structure. Here, we elaborate amodel of visual foraging-in ahierarchical context-wherein agents infer ahigher-order visual pattern (a "scene") by sequentially sampling ambiguous cues.
